今天 ListenHub 的AI 视频功能正式上线啦，人类用户和 Agent 现在都可以调用 ListenHub 的服务生成视频。

目前已支持 HappyHorse、Seedance 2.0 等视频模型。

输入一个想法，或使用参考图、参考视频，即可一键生成视频。

人类使用：

ListenHub 官网： https://t.co/zZciPelJKh

Agent 使用： https://t.co/ql7xjfURoc

Thanks for your love 🥰

非常棒👍
欢迎更多朋友分享 html-video 作品
https://t.co/x0AgNRKysb

🚨 Open Design 0.9.0 把用 AI 做设计这件事的门槛降到了最低。

这不是一个小更新。我觉得这是我们真正向“设计平权”迈出的一大步。

以前 agent-native design 更像是给 early adopters 准备的：你要有本地 CLI、API key、模型配置，还要知道该用哪个 agent。很多人还没开始设计，就先被 setup

html-video 已经突破 100 Star✨
Coding Video 一定会为视频创作带来新的可能
项目刚刚开始，初衷也是希望在开源社区中和更多人一起探索下一代的视频创作范式
欢迎加入👉https://t.co/x0AgNRKysb

Absolutely excited to see a lot of you at Adobe 99u today!

Everyone else can watch online (for free). Join me 😀👇 https://t.co/Ym9UKgnZLf
Tune in here: https://t.co/XmSaql0Xbe

You are all AI pioneers and you are in an important position to help the rest of the world to understand how to use this tech and what to do with it. It’s still early, you are not too late. Just start doing what matters to you, tell your stories, build things.

This is a fascinating discussion how MoMA showed video games and there was a backlash why they put it next to Picasso. And then there was a lot of discussions around it. Now no one doubts that video games is a form of art. 

What happens about AI is this early time when people https://t.co/4oKTy6wOt1
